mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly compressing equity risk premiums and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 5.5 percent, labor market tightness accelerates wage growth and consumer spending expectations, driving positive short-term equity returns as earnings revisions turn upward.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns do not exceed the unconditional mean when UNRATE drops below 5.5 percent across a 3-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Joint strength in housing starts and retail sales indicates robust aggregate demand, which compresses equity risk premiums and lifts S&P 500 valuations over the next month as corporate revenue forecasts improve.
failure_condition: S&P 500 forward returns are not significantly higher when both HOUST and RSAFS exceed their respective 12-month moving averages simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals expanding corporate capacity and operational leverage, supporting positive quarterly equity returns as supply-side constraints ease and profit margins stabilize.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth shows no predictive power for 60-day forward returns during early-cycle phases, with Rank IC consistently below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating inflation readings trigger market fears of premature monetary tightening, increasing discount rates and depressing equity valuations over the next month as real yields rise.
failure_condition: Equity returns do not decline when inflation accelerates above the 0.4 percent monthly threshold, or negative returns fail to cluster during high-inflation months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll growth and falling unemployment confirm a durable labor market recovery, boosting near-term equity sentiment and driving positive 5-day forward returns as earnings risk premiums contract.
failure_condition: Joint PAYEMS increase and UNRATE decline fails to predict positive 5-day returns, with directional accuracy below 50 percent in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth provides a fundamental anchor for corporate earnings, with higher growth rates translating to positive quarterly equity returns as revenue trajectories align with analyst expectations.
failure_condition: GDP growth shows no correlation with 60-day forward returns, and rolling Rank IC remains below 0.01 across all business cycle phases.

mechanism_narrative: A widening gap between retail sales and industrial production indicates demand outpacing supply, which initially boosts equity valuations through margin expansion but eventually triggers inflation fears, yielding negative 20-day forward returns.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS exceeds INDPRO by more than 2 standard deviations
failure_condition: The spread between RSAFS and INDPRO fails to predict negative 20-day returns when exceeding the threshold, or positive returns dominate during high-spread periods.
